sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed
before = last_transition.before_frame
after = last_transition.after_frame

before_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in before.segmentation['nodes']}
after_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in after.segmentation['nodes']}

# Check for game object changes
changed = False
for nid in sorted(set(list(before_nodes.keys()) + list(after_nodes.keys()))):
    if nid >= 29:
        continue
    bn = before_nodes.get(nid)
    an = after_nodes.get(nid)
    if bn is None or an is None:
        print(f"  NEW/REMOVED node id={nid}")
        changed = True
        continue
    if bn['color'] != an['color'] or bn['pixels'] != an['pixels'] or bn['hash'] != an['hash']:
        print(f"  CHANGED node id={nid}: color {bn['color']}->{an['color']}, pixels {bn['pixels']}->{an['pixels']}")
        changed = True

if not changed:
    print("Only HUD changed")

# Let me list all nodes to understand the full structure
print("\nAll nodes (excluding HUD):")
for n in after.segmentation['nodes']:
    if n['id'] >= 29:
        continue
    print(f"  id={n['id']}: color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} boundary={n['boundary']} children={n['children']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
